elements.text: You have been focused on your major for a while now, and you are beginning to feel bored and unchallenged. You would like to try another career path, but you worry if you will manage to complete your degree on time. Thinking about your career trajectory, you believe your chances of switching to a career you find fulfilling are...

elements.name: changing_your_trajectory--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
